composition_pattern: raw-cleaning -> lookup-formulas -> duplicate/receipt flags -> exception-sheet -> summary-repair -> validation -> highlighting -> hide-raw -> reorder -> release-format
user_task_description: A monthly close workbook needs a release-ready summary driven by cleaned transactions and exception logic.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Create Clean Transactions and Exceptions sheets; clean and reorder the raw transactions; add Category, Owner, Receipt Required, Review Flag, and Signed Amount formulas; convert cleaned data to CleanTransactions; add Receipt validation; highlight review rows; generate exception rows; repair Close Summary revenue, expense, and net formulas; rename the summary title; hide Raw Transactions and Archive; reorder sheets for release; apply basic release formatting.
atomic_scope: Single-document workflow with coupled edits; preserve unrelated document-native structure.
expected_output_type: A revised .xlsx artifact saved to the required output path.

inspired_by.title: Trying to find unique values when comparing hundreds of millions of rows
Index Match to return multiple values
